name: NATIONAL BANKSHARES INC
summary: National Bankshares, Inc. (NBI) is a Virginia-based financial holding company organized in 1986, operating primarily through its wholly-owned subsidiary The National Bank of Blacksburg (NBB). NBB offers retail and commercial banking services including loans, deposits, trust and wealth management, and debit/credit cards through 28 banking locations across southwest, western and central Virginia. NBI also owns National Bankshares Financial Services, Inc. (NBFS), which provides non-deposit investment and insurance products.

products.name: Commercial and Agricultural Loans
products.description: Lending products for small and mid-sized businesses and agricultural customers.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans for commercial real estate and construction projects.

products.name: Residential Real Estate and Home Equity Loans
products.description: Mortgage and home equity lending products for individuals.

products.name: Consumer Loan Products
products.description: Various consumer lending options offered to individuals.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Interest-bearing and non-interest bearing demand, money market, savings, CDs, HSAs, and IRAs.

products.name: Wealth Management and Trust Services
products.description: Trust, estate, and wealth management services for individuals and businesses.

products.name: Non-Deposit Investment Products
products.description: Investment products offered through NBFS in cooperation with Osaic, Inc.

products.name: Insurance Products
products.description: Insurance products offered through NBFS in cooperation with Bearing Insurance Group, LLC.

products.name: Online, Mobile and Telephone Banking
products.description: Digital and telephone banking access for customers.

products.name: Business and Consumer Debit and Credit Cards
products.description: Debit and credit card products for business and individual customers.

partnerships.description: NBFS works with Osaic, Inc. to provide non-deposit investment products to customers.
NBFS partners with Bearing Insurance Group, LLC to offer insurance products to customers.
